present: Introduce yourself.
What are you like as a person?
What are your best qualities?
What do you like to do and why?
What makes you different?
past: What were you like when you were younger?
What did you like to do when you were a child?
Have you changed a lot in recent years?
What did you learn about yourself last year?
What did you do recently that made you feel proud?
future: What would you like to be like in the future?
What do you want to improve about yourself?
What are you going to do this year to improve?
What would you like your life to be like in the future?
What would you like to achieve soon?

present: What is your area like?
What is there in your area?
Do you like living in your area? Why?
Describe your house or apartment.
What is your room like?
past: What was your area like when you were younger?
Where did you live before?
What did you do in your area when you were a child?
What was your house like when you were younger?
What did you like to do on your street when you were younger?
future: Would you like to live somewhere else in the future? Why?
What would you like your house to be like in the future?
Where would you like to live in ten years' time?
Would you like to live in the city centre or on the outskirts? Why?
What would you change in your area in the future?

present: What is your school like?
Do you like your school? Why?
What is your favourite subject? Why?
What do you normally do at break time?
What do you think of homework?
past: What was your first year in secondary school like?
What subjects did you like last year?
What did you do on your last school trip?
What was your favourite teacher like last year?
What did you find most difficult at school last year?
future: What would you change in your school?
What are you going to do after the exams?
Would you like to study at university? Why?
What subjects would you like to study next year?
What would you like to achieve this year at school?

present: Describe your family.
Who do you live with?
How do you get on with your family?
Do you like spending time with your family? Why?
What do you do with your family at weekends?
past: What did you do with your family last weekend?
What did you celebrate with your family last year?
What was your relationship with your family like when you were younger?
What did you like to do with your family when you were a child?
Where did you go with your family last summer?
future: What are you going to do with your family next weekend?
Would you like to have a big family in the future? Why?
Where would you like to go on holiday with your family next summer?
How would you like to celebrate your birthday next year?
What would you like to do with your family in the future?

present: Describe your best friend.
What do you normally do with your friends?
Where do you meet your friends?
Do you like going out with your friends? Why?
What qualities do you value in a friend?
past: What did you do with your friends last weekend?
Where did you go with your friends last Saturday?
How did you meet your best friend?
What did you do at your last party or outing with friends?
What did you like to do with your friends when you were younger?
future: What are you going to do with your friends next weekend?
Would you like to travel with your friends in the future? Why?
Where would you like to go with your friends next summer?
Would you like to live with friends in the future? Why?
What plans do you have with your friends for the future?

present: What do you do in your free time?
What hobbies do you have?
Do you like sport? Why?
What do you do on a normal Saturday?
Do you prefer staying at home or going out? Why?
past: What did you do last weekend?
What did you do yesterday afternoon?
What did you do in your free time when you were younger?
What sport did you play before?
What did you do during your last Easter holidays?
future: What are you going to do next weekend?
What would you like to learn to do in the future?
Would you like to do a new sport? Why?
What are you going to do this afternoon?
What plans do you have for the next long weekend?

present: Do you like holidays? Why?
What are your ideal holidays like?
Do you prefer the beach or the mountains? Why?
What do you normally do in summer?
Do you like travelling? Why?
past: Where did you go last summer?
What did you do last summer?
Who did you go on holiday with last year?
What did you like most about your last holidays?
What was your last trip like?
future: Where would you like to go next summer?
What are you going to do in the next holidays?
Would you like to visit Spain? Why?
What would you do if you had a lot of money to travel?
What country would you like to travel to in the future? Why?

present: Do you do sport? How often?
What do you do to keep fit?
Do you like eating healthily? Why?
What do you think of fast food?
How many hours do you normally sleep?
past: What sport did you do when you were younger?
What did you eat yesterday?
Have you ever had an injury? What happened?
What was your routine like before?
What did you do the last time you were ill?
future: What are you going to do to look after your health this year?
Would you like to go to the gym more in the future? Why?
What healthy habits would you like to have?
What are you going to change in your diet?
How would you like to be in five years' time?

present: Do you use your phone a lot? Why?
What social networks do you use?
Do you like technology? Why?
How much time do you spend on the Internet each day?
What advantages does the Internet have?
past: When did you get your first phone?
What did you do before social media?
What video game did you like when you were younger?
Have you ever lost your phone? What happened?
What was technology like in your childhood?
future: Do you think technology will be better in the future? Why?
Would you like to have less screen time in the future? Why?
What technological invention would you like to see in the future?
How do you think social media will change?
What are you going to do to use your phone less?

present: What is your favourite food? Why?
What do you usually have for breakfast?
Do you like cooking? Why?
Do you prefer eating at home or out? Why?
What do you normally eat at school?
past: What did you eat yesterday?
What did you have for dinner last night?
What was the best meal you tried last year?
Who cooked at home when you were younger?
What did you like to eat when you were a child?
future: What are you going to eat today?
Would you like to learn to cook better? Why?
What dish would you like to try in the future?
Are you going to change your diet this year?
What would you like to eat on a special occasion?

present: What is important to you in life?
What do you like about your life now?
Which subjects are you best at?
What do you like to do to relax?
Do you like learning languages? Why?
past: What did you want to be when you were younger?
What important decision did you make last year?
What was the best thing about last year for you?
What did you learn last year?
What did you like to do when you were a child?
future: What are you going to do after secondary school?
What do you want to study or what job do you want to do?
Where would you like to live in the future? Why?
How do you imagine your life in ten years' time?
What goals do you have for next year?
